title: Tesla’s robotaxis are moving in reverse
summary: The quarter-over-quarter decline runs counter to Tesla’s rhetoric and actions in the past year. Ashok Elluswamy, Tesla’s VP of AI, boasted that Tesla’s Robotaxis have had “zero notable incidents” while driving “more than 380,000 miles” without a safety operator onboard.
